Welcome back, pilot

Cosmic Catchers

Two disks follow fixed lines. Flip each monster to the correct color before they reach the target.

TOP / GREENThe green monster catches the green disk.
BOTTOM / REDThe red monster catches the red disk.

Difficulty

Mission

A / ← flips the left lane · D / → flips the right lane

Stats control

Reset stats?

Reset all game stats and start over?

Final check

Really start over?

Is this really what you want? All scores, victories, clear times, and unlocked Endless modes will be cleared.
